title: Create - Forge Frontier [Old/Outdated]
description: Explore the enhanced Minecraft world with Create: Forge Frontier - new mobs, advanced storage, and immersive landscapes, all centered on the Create mod.
body:
# Create - Forge Frontier [Old and Outdated]
![Create - Forge Frontier logo with Beautiful Cliff side in the Background](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/M0nkeyPr0grammer/Create-Forge-Frontier/main/CreateForgeFrontier_BannerImage.png)
# Version 2.0.0+ Info:
## These newer versions are exclusively found on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/forge-frontier) due to mod restrictions. For more details and regular updates, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/quenZthXgy) server.

### Want to setup a server using our official server host, click the banner below!
[![BisectHosting Code](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/M0nkeyPr0grammer/Landscapes-Reimagined/main/BH_Landscape_Reimagined.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/M0nkeyPr0grammer?r=modrinth)
